message.content:
@startuml
actor "Sales Clerk" as SalesClerk
participant "OrderDeliveredUI" as OrderDeliveredUI
participant "OrderDeliveredController" as OrderDeliveredController
participant "OrderDeliveredService" as OrderDeliveredService
participant "PersistenceContext" as PersistenceContext
participant "RepositoryFactory" as RepositoryFactory
participant "orderRepository : Repository" as orderRepository
participant "orderList : List<Order>" as orderList
participant "orderDTOList : List<OrderDTO>" as orderDTOList
participant "OrderMapper" as OrderMapper
participant "orderDTO : OrderDTO" as orderDTO
participant "selectedOrderDTOList : List<OrderDTO>" as selectedOrderDTOList
participant "order : Order" as order

SalesClerk -> OrderDeliveredUI : The Sales Clerk initializes\nthe process of updating the status of the order
OrderDeliveredUI -> OrderDeliveredController : create
OrderDeliveredController -> OrderDeliveredService : create
OrderDeliveredService -> PersistenceContext : repositories()
PersistenceContext -> RepositoryFactory : create
OrderDeliveredService -> RepositoryFactory : factory
OrderDeliveredService -> orderRepository : orderRepository()
orderRepository -> orderRepository : create
OrderDeliveredService -> OrderDeliveredController : orderRepository
OrderDeliveredController -> OrderDeliveredService : listAllDispatchedOrders()
OrderDeliveredService -> orderRepository : getAllDispatchedOrders()
orderRepository -> orderList : create
OrderDeliveredService -> OrderDeliveredController : orderList
OrderDeliveredController -> OrderDeliveredUI : orderDTOList
OrderDeliveredUI -> SalesClerk : The System presents a list of Orders to the\nSales Clerk whose Status are "Preparation"\nand asks the Sales Clerk to choose Orders\nwhose Status will be updated to "Delivered".
SalesClerk -> OrderDeliveredUI : The Sales Clerk selects the Orders whose\nStatus are to be updated.
OrderDeliveredUI -> OrderDeliveredController : updateStatus(selectedOrderDTOList)
OrderDeliveredController -> OrderDeliveredService : updateStatusAndPersist(selectedOrderDTOList)
loop foreach
    OrderDeliveredService -> selectedOrderDTOList : getNext()
    selectedOrderDTOList -> OrderDeliveredService : orderDTO
    OrderDeliveredService -> OrderMapper : toOrder(orderDTO)
    OrderMapper -> OrderDeliveredService : order
    OrderDeliveredService -> order : changeStatusToDelivered()
    OrderDeliveredService -> orderRepository : update(order)
end
OrderDeliveredService -> OrderDeliveredController : 
OrderDeliveredController -> OrderDeliveredUI : 
OrderDeliveredUI -> SalesClerk : The System updates the Status of the selected Orders\nand informs the Sales Clerk of the operation success.
@enduml
